title: From Star Wars to Indiana Jones: The Best of the Lucasfilm Archives
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|italics=1}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:BestArchives.jpg]] |title=''From Star Wars to Indiana Jones:
The Best of the Lucasfilm Archives'' |author=[[Mark Cotta Vaz]], [[Shinji Hata]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Chronicle Books]] |release date=[[January]] [[1995]]''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, New Edition]]'' |type=Hardcover, Softcover |pages=208 |dimensions=0.8 x 9.0 x 11.8 inches |weight=2.5 pounds |isbn=0811809722 |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''From Star Wars to Indiana Jones: The Best of the Lucasfilm Archives''''' is a predominantly photo-based reference book that chronologically surveys the [[Lucasfilm Archives]]'s highlights: props, models, storyboards, backdrops, and sketches, spanning the [[Original trilogy|''Star Wars'' Trilogy]] as well as the ''[[Indiana Jones]]'' Trilogy. This book is very similar to [[Star Wars Chronicles|''Star Wars: Chronicles'']], also published by the Chronicle Books, but is less indepth. In the United Kingdom, the book was published by [[Virgin Books]] as '''''The Star Wars Archives'''''. ==Contents== *Foreword *Dawn of Dreams *[[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|Star Wars]] *[[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']] *[[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']] *''Raiders of the Lost Ark'' *''Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom'' *''Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade'' *Future Dreams *Credits *Acknowledgements ==Sources== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from From Star Wars to Indiana Jones: The Best of the Lucasfilm Archives}} *{{InsiderCite|25|Star News}} *''[[The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{Amazon|url=Star-Wars-Indiana-Jones-Lucasfilm/dp/0811809722|text=From Star Wars to Indiana Jones: The Best of the Lucasfilm Archives}} *{{IndyWiki}} {{Interlang |de=Von Star Wars bis Indiana Jones }} [[Category:Real-world reference books]]
